name: Como Park Golf Course
address: 1431 Lexington Pkwy N, St Paul, MN 55103
about: Como Park Golf Course is an 18-hole championship course located behind the Como Park Zoo & Conservatory. It is a shorter, sporty layout with a par 70, playing 5,581 yards from the middle tees. The course features rolling, well-bunkered greens, water hazards, and elevation changes. The clubhouse provides a full-service bar and quality food service. Simulators are available at other venues within the Saint Paul Parks and Recreation system.
why_golfers_like_it: Scenic course nestled near the Como Park Zoo & Conservatory
Full-service clubhouse with food and beverages
Variety of leagues and tournaments available for all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: Quality food service available at the clubhouse
Full service bar available at Cozy's Pub in the clubhouse

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The provided information does not specify if club rentals are available at Como Park Golf Course. It is recommended to contact the venue directly for details on club rental services.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The clubhouse offers quality food service and a full-service bar, so bringing outside food and drinks is likely not permitted.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round typically take?
faq.answer: The provided content does not specify the average duration of an 18-hole round. The time it takes will depend on player skill level and course conditions.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Como Park Golf Course is considered kid-friendly. It offers a 'Youth on Course' program and provides a welcoming atmosphere for families, making it suitable for juniors and youth.
